suite.name: suite S1779636580941 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When User Clicks The Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See The Product List
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_SAUCE_002 Add Product To Cart

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When User Clicks The Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See The Product List
Verify Product List Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: When User Selects A Product And Adds It To Cart
Then The Product Should Appear In Cart With Correct Count
Then The Product Price Should Be Visible
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC_SAUCE_003 Complete Payment Process

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When User Clicks The Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See The Product List
Verify Product List Is Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.
Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: When User Selects A Product And Adds It To Cart
When User Fills Delivery Information With Personal Data
Then Confirmation Message Should Be Displayed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'class:inventory_list' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
